title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three strategies inspired by Andrej Karpathy for using Claude Code effectively: LLM knowledge bases, auto-research, and context engineering. The video positions these as methods to multiply productivity in AI-assisted code projects.
